themes: Managers dominate the backlog across franchises, property management, and travel — signaling that mid-level operators are the primary stakeholders experiencing friction with day-to-day location workflows and reporting.
Wait times range from 10 to 362 days with the majority exceeding 100 days, indicating a systemic gap in Product responsiveness that risks eroding trust with active, vocal customers.

Several accounts appear multiple times (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Ford, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, etc.), suggesting unresolved pain points that span teams and may point to deeper, recurring product gaps worth prioritizing.
